supersedes.reason: The requester explicitly withdrew the official-office request route and selected public data plus declared inference for simulator development.

sourceStatement: 遠賀川河川事務所への資料照会はしません．公開データや推論に基づいてシミュレータを開発します．次に進める作業を教えてください．
approvedActions: download and archive publicly available official hydrology metadata and observations
extract explicitly published barrage and fishway facts from public official documents
prepare provisional inference ensembles for inputs that remain unavailable publicly
prepare maps and cross-sections for requester review before any new numerical run
notApproved: contacting the Onga River Office by email, form, telephone, post, or any other route
representing inferred bathymetry, discharge, roughness, gate state, or fishway hydraulics as observed fact
using a single inferred parameter set as the true state of the Onga estuary
claiming physical Validation or measured-flow reproduction
running a new numerical scenario before the visual input packet and execution scope are explicitly approved
changing the approved 680633-pixel water geometry or 50129-cell metric mesh
connecting the candidate solver to the public simulator
